base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_title_galaga_score_legend — a ui (hud_readout) from 1981 galaga. Title screen — 'GALAGA / SCORE' with point-value legend for each enemy (Zako bee 50/80, Goei butterfly 100/160, Boss Galaga + captured variants) rendered beside their sprites. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Title screen — 'GALAGA / SCORE' with point-value legend for each enemy (Zako bee 50/80, Goei butterfly 100/160, Boss Galaga + captured variants) rendered beside their sprites; '1UP HIGH SCORE 2UP' header. CRT portrait-rotated
